dialog.stepLabel: Carlow: "See, he must have passed through here too. These traces sugg..."

items.speaker: Carlow
items.text: See, he must have passed through here too. These traces suggest he was doing high jump training.

items.speaker: Carlow
items.text: They say your journey is also part of your training. I guess he didn't waste a chance to hone his skills.

items.speaker: Carlow
items.text: {PlayerName}, what do you say? Shall we give it a try ourselves? The only problem is, how do we jump that high?
